metadata.description: Framework for self-evolving AI personas on Claude Code

plugins.name: persona-manager
plugins.description: Scaffolds and manages AI personas in ~/.personas/

plugins.name: persona-dashboard
plugins.description: Expansion pack — adds a visual HTML dashboard with task tracking to any persona

plugins.name: persona-remote
plugins.description: Expansion pack — deploy a persona to a remote server as a Docker container with Tailscale SSH access and bidirectional sync

plugins.name: bridgey
plugins.description: Expansion pack — inter-agent communication via A2A protocol
